Wash potatoes in cold water to remove excess dirt from skins.
In a 600 Hotel Pan, add potatoes and all other ingredients.  Oil should cover by about an inch.
Cover with aluminum foil, shiny side out, and crimp to seal the sides.
In a preheated oven set to ~500°F, cook potatoes for ~2 hours.  Check every 30 minutes for tenderness.
Once potatoes are tender but whole, remove from oven and allow to cool covered to room temp.
Strain oil and reserve.  Use old oil once before discarding.
Cool potatoes in a blast chiller then reserve to hotel pan in cooler until needed for service.
Remove any garlic or herbs that can be removed.
